# Source Card: Reusable Assertion Ledger Phase 0 Fixture Evidence

## Summary

# Reusable Assertion Ledger Phase 0 deterministic fixture evidence This local-only source describes the frozen `reusable-assertion-ledger-phase0-local-only-v1` fixture.

## Key evidence

- (ev_001) # Reusable Assertion Ledger Phase 0 deterministic fixture evidence
- (ev_002) This local-only source describes the frozen `reusable-assertion-ledger-phase0-local-only-v1` fixture.
- (ev_003) The fixture contains 12 synthetic runs and 120 synthetic source inputs.
- (ev_004) The fixture defines 144 run-source processing opportunities, of which 36 are safe reuse opportunities.
- (ev_005) The fixture audits all 36 eligible reused assertions and records 36 correct passage-provenance checks.
- (ev_006) The fixture identity check compares 240 assertions across three reruns in two input orders, for 1,440 comparisons.
- (ev_007) The fixture changes 48 assertion timeframes and validates 48 new identities, 48 predecessor links, and retention of all prior fixture IDs.
- (ev_008) The fixture runs `proposed -> reviewed -> active -> split -> superseded -> rolled_back`; source IDs and history persist.

## Limitations

- Synthetic/local-only fixture evidence; it is not representative of a private corpus.
- Representative private-corpus economics, measured model cost, and reviewer effort are unavailable.
- Real-source normalization and canonical-merge safety are unavailable; no human merge labels were used.
